query:
-- Clear the accumulated attempt history so reaper treats them as fresh
DELETE FROM providerJobLogs
WHERE sceneId IN (540002, 540003, 540004, 540005, 540006, 540007, 540008, 540009);

-- Reset all 8 failed scenes to pending
UPDATE musicVideoScenes
SET mvSceneStatus = 'pending',
    taskId = NULL,
    videoUrl = NULL,
    errorMessage = NULL,
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE id IN (540002, 540003, 540004, 540005, 540006, 540007, 540008, 540009);

-- Reset the parent job back to rendering so the dispatch loop picks it up
UPDATE musicVideoJobs
SET status = 'rendering',
    completedScenes = 1,
    errorMessage = NULL,
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE id = 510025;

-- Verify
SELECT id, status, completedScenes, totalScenes, errorMessage FROM musicVideoJobs WHERE id = 510025;
SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt, mvSceneStatus FROM musicVideoScenes WHERE jobId = 510025 GROUP BY mvSceneStatus;
